violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee holding a phone with gloved hands and did not change them before beginning food preparation. Gloves should be changed when switching tasks or they become dirty by handling other items.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Spaghetti sauce found thawing in a sink filled with water. Frozen food items should be placed in a container and run cold water into it to help food items maintain proper temperature. ***Corrected during inspection.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the Italian area and the cabinets below the beverage bar in the dining area were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles and vents were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Containers of diced ham and peppers were found at 50-54F during inspection. Potentially hazardous foods should be maintained at 41F or below. ***Items were discarded during inspection.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee wipe her gloved hands on a towel and continue working. Gloves should be changed when they become soiled.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. The outside of the dish machine was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles and light fixtures in the dish area were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
